jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
